objective: Continue hybrid matrix handoff work on the real Regular05 EIS clip using the fixed source_to_dest device replay convention.

accepted_stage_dependency.claim_boundary: Accepted as Regular05 device replay quality checkpoint; not full real-time EIS.

allowed: Regular05 device replay uses source_to_dest matrix convention
MMAPI/VPI/NVENC device-side warp path preserves full-frame output on Regular05
hybrid matrix handoff can be tested against the fixed Regular05 replay
forbidden: using outdoor-car inverse convention as the Regular05 default

frozen_variables: live_matrix_producer.py must use --output-convention source_to_dest for Regular05 work
bad inverse is diagnostic only, not a main display asset
next_actions: Generate any future Regular05 stream/live producer matrices with source_to_dest convention, explicitly passing --output-convention source_to_dest when using live_matrix_producer.py.
Compare stream/live outputs against fixed Regular05 device replay, not outdoor-car post_geometry_identity_first.
Keep the clean source/CPU/fixed-device review video as the main visual asset.

matrix_convention_audit.cpu_stabilize_matrix_output: Writes per-output-frame 3x3 warp matrices for frames after the first output frame; rows are source_to_dest for OpenCV warp semantics before fixed crop/resize/sharpen post-processing.
matrix_convention_audit.prepare_device_matrix_csv.py: Supports --output-convention source_to_dest|inverse and can compose post geometry. Use source_to_dest for Regular05 replay/handoff; inverse remains historical outdoor-car smoke behavior.
matrix_convention_audit.stream_matrix_csv.py: Convention-neutral row streamer. It preserves the input CSV convention and only handles delivery timing.
matrix_convention_audit.live_matrix_producer.py: Now supports --output-convention source_to_dest|inverse. Default remains inverse for historical compatibility; Regular05 work must pass source_to_dest explicitly.
matrix_convention_audit.mmapi_stream_consumer: Consumes matrix rows as provided. It does not infer or convert convention; therefore the producer or prepared CSV must already match the active contract.
matrix_convention_audit.outdoor_car_boundary: Outdoor-car inverse/post_geometry_identity_first remains dataflow smoke only and must not be used as Regular05 EIS-quality convention.

success_criteria: frame-index alignment log has no gaps if handoff is used
quality does not regress relative to fixed Regular05 device replay
